Essence of Dol  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 28
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
DEX: +5
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: MNK BST
Race: HUM BAR ELF TRL OGR IKS VAH FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Essence of Dol
QuoteReply
# Oct 07 2016 at 7:03 PM Rating: Excellent
snailish
4,580 posts
We could use someone's modern experience hunting the NPC for this drop.

We need a modern item window pic of this item.

We know this has a red pulsing graphic, would still be nice to have a shot of someone wielding it.
▲ Page top
Essence of Dol
QuoteReply
# Dec 29 2016 at 2:42 PM Rating: Good
DarkVendetta
Guru
189 posts
Here is an updated Item info window for this, as well as graphic on a monk.
The mob is still in Frontier mountains in the Goblin caves near the Burning Woods Zone line side of the zone. Chief Rokgus spawns in one place always, there are PH's. He has parts for multiple quest lines out of Cabilis. at lv 51 he is Light blue. and if you deal with all the adds in the room first, his is a simple fight. The room is the middle room of the caves, being the north room has the Traitor, the south room has the 2 slaves, Rokgus is in the middle room. Best approximate /loc for Chief Rukgus spawn point is /loc : -1810, +1760, -376.
[img=272825]
[img=272824]

Edited, Dec 29th 2016 3:52pm by DarkVendetta
____________________________
Hope you enjoy (This recipe is a trademark by Nightmares Inc., all rights reserved.) :-D
▲ Page top

DarkVendetta wrote:
Here is an updated Item info window for this, as well as graphic on a monk.
The mob is still in Frontier mountains in the Goblin caves near the Burning Woods Zone line side of the zone. Chief Rokgus spawns in one place always, there are PH's. He has parts for multiple quest lines out of Cabilis. at lv 51 he is Light blue. and if you deal with all the adds in the room first, his is a simple fight. The room is the middle room of the caves, being the north room has the Traitor, the south room has the 2 slaves, Rokgus is in the middle room. Best approximate /loc for Chief Rukgus spawn point is /loc : -1810, +1760, -376.

essence of dol
QuoteReply
# Mar 02 2003 at 11:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361072180
View User Forum
29 posts
does some know if there is another one hand blunt weapon that gives the same pulsating effect as the essence.i have a monk charactet that has an essence and is looking for something to match
▲ Page top
RE: essence of dol
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2004 at 6:24 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Delightful orb of forgotten magic has similar graphic, but if you are using essence of dol, I doubt its in your price range.
▲ Page top
RE: essence of dol
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2003 at 7:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757717401
64 posts
Well, there are a lot of monk weapons with this effect. I believe any weapon that starts with 'Fist' , such as Fist of Rock, has the same graphic, the red pulsating thing. A few of the higher end items have this as well, but I assume you're looking for something tradable.

--Edit--
Shoot, I just noticed you said 1 hand blunt, now that you mention it, no I dont think so, they are all h2h weaps. This was around before h2h weapons existed really, so it was flagged as 1hb.

Edited, Mon Apr 28 07:39:26 2003
▲ Page top
RE: essence of dol
QuoteReply
# Dec 03 2003 at 8:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591789337875
108 posts
Actully the Orb of Tishan has the same particle and is 1hb , though not monk usable
▲ Page top
Helping others in need
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2002 at 2:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767386144
9 posts
My policy in EQ has always been to help other monks in need, so i too passed on my Essence of dol, fighting batons, CoT and even my wu armor on to another monk in FoB outside cabilis one day, after i finally got into a guild where i felt home and started to get better gear.

These items are really no value these days, so if i get by one i usually get it very cheap and i kinda like giving it to a newbie monk, most get extremely happy.

But again the player has to be a "genuine" newbie, not a twink, that can be found out in the way the person talks really, and i hate when the twinks try to beg stuff off me, they should go buy their frigging gear, true noobs have better need.

-Peace-


Mohan Spectralfist - The Chosen Alliance
60 Grandmaster - Rodcet Nife
▲ Page top
100pp
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2002 at 1:32 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759076529
95 posts
These go for around 100pp now. I got one then not 20 minutes later some guy trade me a Polished Steel Ulak 9 dmg 27 dly 3 ac 3 str 3 wis 25 mana and other stats for my EOD. The PSU is HTH so that helps my hth attack considering at my level its like 5 dmg 36 dly or something to that effect. Anyway...the EOD is a very good weapon up until the Fighting Baton or COT can be aquired. =)
